summary: Comprehensive testing of LLM-native tool calling voice conversation agent completed successfully. All tool calling mechanisms working perfectly - grammar_check, vocabulary_lookup, pronunciation_guide, start_scenario, and evaluate_response tools trigger correctly based on user input. Multi-language support confirmed with 99 languages. Spanish/French conversations respond appropriately in target languages. Frontend UI fully functional with voice/text modes, language picker, and seamless integration.

minor_issues.issue: Correctly rejects fake audio files (Whisper validation)

passed_tests: POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages - grammar_check tool triggers correctly with 'Check my grammar: I goed to store'
POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages - pronunciation_guide tool triggers with 'How do you pronounce entrepreneur?'
POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages - vocabulary_lookup tool triggers with 'What does serendipity mean?'
POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages - start_scenario tool triggers with 'Let's practice a job interview'
POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages - normal conversation works without tool calls ('Hello, how are you?')
Spanish conversation responds in Spanish with appropriate tool calling
French conversation responds in French with proper grammar assistance
GET /api/languages returns 99 languages (41 popular + 58 others)
POST /api/tts works with Spanish, French, German text
POST /api/conversations/{id}/voice-message endpoint validates audio correctly
Landing page loads with '50+ Languages' badge prominently displayed
Chat page loads with language picker, voice mode, and proper UI elements
Language picker dropdown with search functionality works perfectly
Voice and text mode toggle switches seamlessly
Message sending displays tool badges for grammar/vocabulary/pronunciation tools
Spanish language selection creates conversations that respond in Spanish
Dashboard page shows progress stats, tool usage analytics, scenarios practiced
Vocabulary page displays saved words with definitions and examples
Navigation between all pages (chat, dashboard, vocabulary) works correctly
Multi-conversation management in sidebar with language labels
Agent loop architecture processes messages with 5-15 second response time as expected
LLM autonomously decides when to call tools based on user input patterns
Subagent chains execute properly (grammar, vocabulary, pronunciation, evaluation)
Tool calling results feed back correctly into main agent response
